dc:title: Provisional view of a street beside a fortified wall and domed church
dc:description: Street-level view along an urban roadway bordered on the left by a high historic masonry wall with crenellated sections. Behind or adjoining the wall is a church-like building with a prominent dome and lantern. The road curves slightly through the scene and includes moving and parked vehicles, lane markings, sidewalks, a streetlight, and roadside signs. A leafy tree occupies the right side of the frame, with low commercial or residential buildings beyond it. In the lower foreground, out-of-focus handlebars and a saddle or seat suggest the photograph was made from or near a bicycle or scooter, creating a blurred framing element at the bottom edge.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
